sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n78019" key="paraqhteu/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παραθητεύω</orth>, <sense id="n78019.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">serve for hire</tr_>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">τινι</itype> Epic. ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.761e</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
